flashcards.definition: (x − h)² + (y − k)² = r²; center (h, k), radius r.
x² + y² + Dx + Ey + F = 0; convert by completing the square.
Technique to rewrite general form into standard form.
Read directly from standard form: center = (h, k), radius = √(r²).
Plot center, mark radius in all directions, draw smooth curve.
